title: Muttichur Kallattupuzha Sri Maha Siva Temple
tagline: Muttichur Kallattupuzha Sri Maha Siva Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

heroImage.alt: Muttichur Kallattupuzha Sri Maha Siva Temple, Kerala

overview.short: The Muttichur Kallattupuzha Sri Maha Siva Temple is located in Anthikad in Thrissur district of Kerala.
overview.description: The Muttichur Kallattupuzha Sri Maha Siva Temple is located in Anthikad in Thrissur district of Kerala. This temple is a classic example of the Kerala style of architecture. Kallattupuzha Temple is situated on the banks of the Karuvannur River and the presiding deity of the temple is Shiva, located in main sanctum sanatorum, facing west. According to folklore, sage Parashurama has installed the idol.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Anthikad Karthyayani Temple
topPlaces.description: Anthikad Karthyayani Bhagavathy Temple is a Hindu temple situated in Anthikad, Thrissur district of Kerala, India. Cochin Devaswom Board controls the temple.

topPlaces.name: Thoniyakavu Bhadrakali Temple
topPlaces.description: The Thoniyakavu Temple is an ancient Hindu temple dedicated to the Goddess Bhadrakali, located in the village of Puthenpeedika in Kerala state, India. The temple is a classic example of the architectural style of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Anthikad
topPlaces.description: Anthikad (അന്തിക്കാട് in Malayalam) is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India. It is in Thrissur Thaluk, Nattika constituency and Anthikad Block.

topPlaces.name: Puthenpeedika
topPlaces.description: Puthenpeedika is a small south Indian village in the Thrissur district of the Indian state of Kerala. It is located 17 km from the town of Thrissur.

topPlaces.name: Aneswaram Siva Temple
topPlaces.description: Aneswaram Siva temple is at Chemmappilly, the western area of Thrissur District. Its main Deity is Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Avanangattilkalari Vishnumaya Temple
topPlaces.description: Avanangattilkalari Sree Vishnumaya Temple (alternatively Avanangatt Chathan Temple) is a Hindu temple at Peringottukara, Thrissur District, Kerala state, India. It is dedicated to the god Vishnumaya in Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Vadakkummuri
topPlaces.description: Vadakkummuri is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Padiyam
topPlaces.description: Padiyam is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala.

Aneswaram Siva temple is at Chemmappilly, the western area of Thrissur District. Its main Deity is Shiva.

Vadakkummuri is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India.
Padiyam is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Muttichur Kallattupuzha Sri Maha Siva Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Muttichur Kallattupuzha Sri Maha Siva Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Muttichur Kallattupuzha Sri Maha Siva Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (45 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (56 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Muttichur Kallattupuzha Sri Maha Siva Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Muttichur Kallattupuzha Sri Maha Siva Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Muttichur Kallattupuzha Sri Maha Siva Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Muttichur Kallattupuzha Sri Maha Siva Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Muttichur Kallattupuzha Sri Maha Siva Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Anthikad Karthyayani Temple, Thoniyakavu Bhadrakali Temple, Anthikad, Puthenpeedika, Aneswaram Siva Temple.
